other_observers: Brandon Percival, Rachel Hopper, Larry Semo; Brandon spotted the bird
specific_location: east side of Adobe Creek (Blue Lake) Reseroir
description: This was a medium-sized, dark gray mantled gull with a complete black hood. The bill was reddish. The wings were long with dark primaries folded well past the tail. There were small whitish eye arcs above and below a dark eye. The feet and legs were dark and the rest of the bird was white.Behaviors: Loafing with Franklin's Gulls on a sand beach of an island.Call: none heardPlumage: adult breeding
